numerical_constraints.name: Minimum percentage groene daken

provenance.quoted_text: Minimaal 30% groene daken minimaal 30 cm dikke laag substraat

reasons: Clearly stated in the diagram annotation; document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitplan), which is advisory rather than binding regels.

numerical_constraints.notes: Groene daken moeten minimaal 30 cm dikke laag substraat hebben.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimale substraatdikte groene daken

provenance.quoted_text: Minimaal 30% groene daken minimaal 30 cm dikke laag substraat

reasons: Clearly stated in diagram annotation; beeldkwaliteitplan is advisory not binding.

numerical_constraints.notes: Minimaal 30 cm dikke laag substraat vereist voor groene daken.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimale substraatdikte daken parkeervoorzieningen

provenance.quoted_text: Daken van parkeervoorzieningen hebben een minimaal 40 cm dikke laag substraat

reasons: Clearly stated in diagram annotation; beeldkwaliteitplan is advisory not binding.

numerical_constraints.notes: Daken van parkeervoorzieningen vereisen minimaal 40 cm dikke laag substraat.

narrative_constraints.statement: Green roofs must contribute to biodiversity.

provenance.quoted_text: Groene daken dragen bij aan biodiversiteit

reasons: Stated as a design intention in the beeldkwaliteitplan; advisory rather than a binding rule.

narrative_constraints.statement: Rooftop installations (technical equipment etc.) must be designed out of sight.

provenance.quoted_text: Voorzieningen op het dak buiten het zicht ontworpen

reasons: Clear design requirement stated in the beeldkwaliteitplan; advisory rather than binding regels.

narrative_constraints.statement: Roofs must be used for water retention and buffering.

provenance.quoted_text: Daken gebruiken voor water vasthouden en bufferen

reasons: Stated as a design principle in the beeldkwaliteitplan; advisory in nature.

narrative_constraints.statement: Green roofs may be combined with photovoltaic (PV) panels.

provenance.quoted_text: Groene daken kunnen gecombineerd worden met PV

reasons: Permissive statement, not a hard requirement; from beeldkwaliteitplan which is advisory.

narrative_constraints.statement: Green vegetation on terraces should be encouraged/stimulated.

reasons: Stated as an aspiration/encouragement, not a hard requirement; advisory beeldkwaliteitplan.
